org.bukkit.inventory.meta.BookMeta.BookMetaBuilder

Packages that use BookMeta.BookMetaBuilder
Package
Description
org.bukkit.inventory.meta
The interfaces used when manipulating extra data can can be stored inside item stacks.

    @NotNull BookMeta.BookMetaBuilder
    BookMeta.BookMetaBuilder.addPage(@NotNull Component page)

    BookMeta is mutable, there is no need for a builder.
